backstory.original: Anson has known his share of hardship in his life. Orphaned at a young age, he and his younger brother were forced to live on the streets, doing what they had to do to keep from starving. But while that experience taught his brother to fear and mistrust the world, it had the opposite effect on Anson. Beaten, battered, or bruised, the fighter refuses to stay down, and he doesn't believe in giving up, on anyone or anything. No person is too broken, no cause too lost. It's a philosophy that makes him fiercely loyal to his companions, but sometimes it also results in him charging in recklessly when he should stop and think.
backstory.display: 安森的一生经历了许多苦难。他年幼时便失去双亲，不得不与弟弟露宿街头，做着一切能让他们不至于饿死的营生。这段经历虽然让他弟弟学会了恐惧和不信任这个世界，但却对安森产生了相反的影响。无论被打得如何遍体鳞伤，这位战士都拒绝屈服，他不相信放弃，也不相信任何人或事。没有什么人是无可救药的，没有什么事业是毫无希望的。这一人生观使得他对同伴极为忠诚，但有时候也会导致他在应该停下来冷静思考一下的时候鲁莽行事。

description.original: Anson attacks the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit.
description.display: 安森攻击最近的敌人，造成 1 次命中。

longDescription.original: Anson attacks the closest enemy and deals one hit.
longDescription.display: 安森攻击最近的敌人并造成一次命中。

description.original: Anson attacks the toughest enemy and creates a blast of deadly lightning.
description.display: 安森攻击最强硬的敌人，并制造一场致命的雷暴。

longDescription.original: Anson attacks the toughest enemy with his sword, while blasting all nearby foes with deadly lightning.
longDescription.display: 安森用他的剑攻击最强硬的敌人，同时用致命的闪电轰击所有附近的敌人。

description.desc: Uggie joins the party, starting next to Anson unless she's already in the formation next to another Fallbacks Champion. Uggie increases the damage of all non-adjacent Champions by $amount%.
乌吉加入探险队，并将默认与安森相邻，除非她已在阵型中并与另一位“后备队”勇士相邻。乌吉会使所有非相邻的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。
Anson increases the damage of all Champions in the columns behind him by $(amount)%.
安森会使所有处于他身后各列中的勇士伤害提升 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Anson increases the damage of all Champions in the columns behind him, and Uggie increases the damage of Champions not next to her.
tipText.display: 安森会使所有处于他身后各列中的勇士伤害提高，而乌吉会使不与乌吉相邻的勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: Uggie's buff is increased by $amount% when Anson is in the formation.
当安森在阵型中时，乌吉的增益提高 $amount%。

When Uggie is with Anson, Uggie attacks the closest enemy whenever Anson attacks. Uggie's damage deals 1 second of BUD-based damage and drives the enemy berserk. Berserk enemies move 50% faster and attack twice as often, but deal 90% less damage.
当乌吉跟着安森时，每当安森发动攻击，乌吉会攻击最近的敌人。乌吉的伤害会造成等同于 1 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害，并使敌人发狂。发狂的敌人移动速度增加 50%，攻击频率加倍，但造成的伤害减少 90%。

Each time Anson is attacked or takes damage in an area, he gains a Meditation stack. Each Meditation stack increases the effect of Unshakable by $amount%, stacking multiplicatively. Anson can have a maximum of $(anson_meditation_max_stacks) Meditation stacks, and they reset when changing areas.
每当安森在一个区域中遭到攻击或受到伤害，他会获得一层“冥想”堆叠层数。每层“冥想”堆叠层数会使“坚定不移”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。安森最多可拥有 $(anson_meditation_max_stacks) 层“冥想”堆叠层数，且会在变更区域时重置。

tipText.original: When Anson gets hurt, his Combat Trance meditation increases, further increasing his Unshakable buff.
tipText.display: 安森受到伤害时将堆叠“战斗恍惚”冥想层数，进一步提升他的“坚定不移”增益。

description.desc: Anson increases the effect of Unshakable by $(amount)% for each Good Champion or Fallbacks Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名善良勇士或“后备队”勇士，安森会使“坚定不移”的效果提升 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 善良或“后备队”勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Anson would do anything for his friends.
specializationDescription.display: 安森愿意为了他的朋友赴汤蹈火。

description.desc: Anson increases the effect of Unshakable by $(amount)% for each unaffiliated Champion or Fallbacks Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名无从属组织勇士或“后备队”勇士，安森会使“坚定不移”的效果提升 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 无从属组织或“后备队”勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: As an orphan that grew up in the streets, Anson is always willing to lend a hand to those in need.
specializationDescription.display: 作为一个在街头长大的孤儿，安森总是愿意帮助那些有需要的人。

description.desc: Anson increases the effect of Unshakable by $(amount)% for each formation slot blocked by an escort or Fallbacks Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一个阵型格子被护卫占据，或阵型中有一名“后备队”勇士，安森会使“坚定不移”的效果提升 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 护卫或“后备队”勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Anson's tendency to put himself in harm's way is what Tess loves and fears most about him.
specializationDescription.display: 安森总是把自己置于危险之中，这是苔丝最喜欢也最害怕他的一点。

description.desc: Anson leaps out and attacks the toughest enemy for one ultimate hit. At the same time, a flash of lightning envelops him and all enemies in a large area, dealing an additional ultimate hit to any enemy in the area.
安森一跃而出攻击最强硬的敌人，造成一次杀招命中。同时，一道闪电将他与一大片范围内的敌人笼罩起来，对该范围内的所有敌人造成一次额外的杀招命中。

When Anson uses his Storm Crash ultimate ability, Anson's sword ignites in lightning for 45 seconds. For the duration, Anson's attacks deal an additional $(seconds_of_bud) seconds of BUD-based damage, damage him for damage equal to $(damage_percent)% of his Maximum Health, and increase the maximum stacks of Combat Trance's Meditation by $(stacks_per_attack), up to a maximum of $max_stacks___3 additional maximum stacks. The increase to the maximum stacks resets when changing areas.

当安森使用他的“风暴轰鸣”杀招技能时，他的剑会被闪电点燃，持续 45 秒。在此期间，安森的攻击会造成等同于 $(seconds_of_bud) 秒基础杀招伤害的额外伤害，同时对他自身造成相当于他最大生命值 $(damage_percent)% 的伤害，并使“战斗恍惚”的“冥想”堆叠层数上限提高 $(stacks_per_attack) 层，最多可额外提高 $max_stacks___3 层。堆叠层数上限的提升会在变更区域时重置。
Anson increases the health of all other Champions by $amount% of his max health, and healing effects on all Champions are increased by $amount___2%.
安森会增加所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于他最大生命值的 $amount%，并且所有勇士的治疗效果提高 $amount___2%。

description.original: Family is complicated, or at least mine is. What's left of it.
description.display: 家庭是很复杂的，至少我的家庭，或者说我的家庭还剩下的那部分是如此。

description.original: I'm not giving up, and neither are you! Let's go!
description.display: 我不会放弃的，你们也一样！我们走！

description.original: Does everything in this adventure have to be painful and unnatural?
description.display: 是不是这趟冒险中的一切都得这么痛苦和反常？

description.original: Need to keep going... They're all counting on me...
description.display: 我得继续前进……他们全都指望着我呢……

description.original: Their stance is too wide. Watch this. It'll be quick.
description.display: 他们的姿势破绽太大了。瞧好了，我三两下就收拾他们。

description.original: After what we faced on our first adventure, I'm ready for anything.
description.display: 经历过我们第一次冒险中的那些事后，我现在什么都不怕了。

description.original: I keep my friends close.
description.display: 我让我的朋友待在我身边。

description.original: My enemies? I keep them away from my friends.
description.display: 我的敌人？我让他们远离我的朋友。

description.original: She just loves people, you see. She won't bite. She's just the sweetest.
description.display: 你看，她很喜欢人的。她不会咬人的。她最乖了。

description.original: [Intense stare] ...
description.display: [紧紧地盯着]……

description.original: True mastery is a continuous cutting motion.
description.display: 真正的精通是连续不断的劈砍。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Anson's Combat Trance ability by 40%

description.original: Wait for the perfect opportunity... then... STRIKE!
description.display: 等待完美的时机……然后……出击！

effects.description: Increases the maximum number of Meditation stacks from Anson's Combat Trance ability by 25

description.original: I am the storm that is approaching.
description.display: 我就是那正在逼近的风暴。

effects.description: Erratic Energy now does 10 seconds of BUD

description.original: This is going to hurt, but it will be far worse for you.
description.display: 这会很痛，但你所受到的痛苦会比这大得多。

effects.description: Anson takes half as much damage from his Erratic Energy ability

description.original: I put everything I have into a single strike. Then I do it again.
description.display: 我将我的全部功力凝聚在一击当中。然后我再次出击。

effects.description: Increases the stacks that Anson's Erratic Energy grants to Combat Trance's maximum stacks per hit by 1

description.original: Watch out! I can't control it! I don't know what will happen!
description.display: 小心！我控制不了它！我不知道会发生什么！

effects.description: Increases the maximum number of additional Meditation stacks that can be gained by Anson's Erratic Energy ability by 50

description.original: How about the League of Loot? No? Walkers of Waterdeep?
description.display: 战利品联盟怎么样？没有？水深行者？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Anson's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: You can always count on me. I've got your back.
description.display: 你可以永远依靠我。有我撑着你。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Anson's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Lark's been giving me lessons! Here, watch. No, wait. I need props.
description.display: 拉克一直在教导我！来，看好了。不，等等。我需要道具。

description.original: I just don't think it's a good idea leaving Cazrin alone with all these books.
description.display: 我还是觉得把卡兹琳一个人留在这一堆书里不是个好主意。

description.original: You won't lay a hand on them as long as I still stand!
description.display: 只要我还没倒下，你就别想动他们一个手指头！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Anson has known his share of hardship in his life. Orphaned at a young age, he and his younger brother were forced to live on the streets, doing what they had to do to keep from starving. But while that experience taught his brother to fear and mistrust the world, it had the opposite effect on Anson. Beaten, battered, or bruised, the fighter refuses to stay down, and he doesn't believe in giving up, on anyone or anything. No person is too broken, no cause too lost. It's a philosophy that makes him fiercely loyal to his companions, but sometimes it also results in him charging in recklessly when he should stop and think.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Anson is a Support, Control, and Tanking Champion whose unshakable resolve bolsters the allies behind him. With him is Uggie, the Fallbacks’ slobbering otyugh companion who drives enemies berserk. When the battle grows dire, Anson unleashes the storm within his blade, unleashing devastating power at great personal cost.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 安森的一生经历了许多苦难。他年幼时便失去双亲，不得不与弟弟露宿街头，做着一切能让他们不至于饿死的营生。这段经历虽然让他弟弟学会了恐惧和不信任这个世界，但却对安森产生了相反的影响。无论被打得如何遍体鳞伤，这位战士都拒绝屈服，他不相信放弃，也不相信任何人或事。没有什么人是无可救药的，没有什么事业是毫无希望的。这一人生观使得他对同伴极为忠诚，但有时候也会导致他在应该停下来冷静思考一下的时候鲁莽行事。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 安森是一名支援、控制和坦克型勇士，他那坚定不移的决心支撑着他身后的盟友。在他身边，口水横流的乌吉是“后备队”的食腐兽同伴，它会使敌人发狂。当战局变得危急时，安森会释放剑中的风暴，以极大的个人代价释放出毁灭性的力量。
